title: Drifting Flowers, Flowing Days
overview: Hiroto works at a construction site, Futaba works at a flower shop, and daigo works at a design studio. their life seems to flow as usual, but something begins to change when they think about today and what awaits them in the future. this is a story about youth, about love and everything connected with it.
